assertions.description: A screenshot file was committed to the PR for each affected dashboard
assertions.evidence: Agent created v2/screenshots/after-00-overview.png and v2/screenshots/after-01-deployment-frequency.png, then committed both with git add and git commit.

assertions.description: The screenshot file name clearly identifies which dashboard it belongs to
assertions.evidence: Files follow the after-<slug>.png naming convention specified in the skill: after-00-overview.png, after-01-deployment-frequency.png.

assertions.description: No before screenshots were taken (after-only is the default)
assertions.evidence: No before-*.png files exist in v2/screenshots/. The agent correctly used after-only mode without being explicitly told.

assertions.description: Only affected dashboards are screenshotted — no unmodified dashboards
assertions.evidence: Only 2 screenshot files exist in v2/screenshots/, matching the 2 modified dashboard files in the diff.

assertions.description: Screenshots are taken of Grafana at http://localhost:3004 with panels fully loaded
assertions.evidence: Agent navigated to http://admin:admin@localhost:3004/d/overview?orgId=1&kiosk, waited for panel content, then captured screenshot. Visual inspection confirms rendered panels.
